blockers.description: App crashes on real Switch hardware (fw 21.1.0 / Atmosphere 1.10.1) with error 2168-0002 (data abort) during deko3D initialization
blockers.workaround: Debug NRO built with SD card logging — last line of sdmc:/switchpalace_debug.log identifies exact crash step

human_actions_pending.action: Copy dist/SwitchPalace.nro to sd:/switch/SwitchPalace/SwitchPalace.nro and launch it
human_actions_pending.context: NRO now writes sdmc:/switchpalace_debug.log before each deko3D init step. Bring back that log file + newest file in sd:/atmosphere/crash_reports/

decisions.rationale: borealis SwitchPlatform calls nifm status functions every frame for status bar; uninitialized handle = IPC crash = 2168-0001

decisions.decision: Switched video backend from GLFW+EGL to deko3D (-DUSE_DEKO3D=ON)
decisions.rationale: GLFW glfwInit() fails in applet mode on fw 21.1.0 — EGL/drm_nouveau applet-mode incompatibility; borealis fatal() throws uncaught std::logic_error -> abort. deko3D is the standard Switch GPU API used by all working borealis homebrew
128MB is the hbloader ceiling in applet mode with no headroom
borealis fatal() throws std::logic_error; uncaught = std::terminate -> abort -> 2168-0001

decisions.decision: Added SD card debug logging to main.cpp and borealis switch_video.cpp
decisions.rationale: deko3D data abort (2168-0002) happens before any display is up; file logging to sdmc:/ is the only way to pinpoint which init step crashes

next_action: User provides sdmc:/switchpalace_debug.log content. Last line = exact deko3D crash step. Fix that step and rebuild. Then remove debug logging before final hw-verify.
context_notes: Three successive crashes fixed: (1) nifm uninitialized -> IPC abort, (2) GLFW glfwInit fail in applet mode -> uncaught exception abort, (3) current: deko3D data abort - unknown which step. Debug build will identify it. NRO is 6.5MB with deko3D shaders embedded. Build is via Docker only (local devkitPro lacks GLFW/EGL but has deko3D; Docker has full devkitpro/devkita64 with both).
